videos.title: Asian 'Door to Hell' Is Сlosing, And That's a Huge Problem
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: The Darvaza gas crater in Turkmenistan has been burning for over 50 years. The hole is 226 feet wide, located in the Karakum Desert, and has become a major tourist attraction. videos.title: Astronomers Found an Impossible Object at the Edge of Our Solar System
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Far beyond Pluto, at the frozen edge of our Solar System, scientists have found an object that appears to be doing something impossible. videos.description:
Voyager has traveled farther than any spacecraft in human history, sending back incredible discoveries from the edge of our solar system and beyond.

videos.description:
